ops.title: Fleet sweep: retrofit .pre-commit-config.yaml as rendered artifact
ops.description: Per repo: layout.toml (+ local fragments preserving customizations — diff vs canonical first), rm old config, FULL cc-guides render (scoped render freezes pins), check --diff, uvx prek run --all-files + commit hygiene fallout, ship scoped paths with explicit --bookmark trunk. RE-DERIVE inventory from cc-notes note aa4cb717 (2026-07-16 remigration: 22 migrated / 3 deferred / 8 bespoke) instead of the plan's pre-migration buckets; respect shared-tree dirty gates. Requires KindYAML release + yaml fragments on main.

ops.text: every migrated fleet repo with a language layer has a rendered .pre-commit-config.yaml, cc-guides check green, CI green on the retrofit commit
customized repos (cc-present, yclaw, …) keep their bespoke hooks via local fragments — verified by diffing rendered config vs pre-retrofit config
